howItWorks.intro: This estate planning cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Probate Savings
rules.formula: Savings = Estate Value x Probate Rate (4-5%)
rules.explanation: Trusts bypass probate, saving the percentage that courts and attorneys typically charge.

howItWorks.outro: Laws vary by jurisdiction and change frequently. This is not legal advice — consult a licensed attorney.

faq.q: Is a living trust worth the cost?
faq.a: For estates over $100,000 or those with real estate, a living trust typically saves far more in probate costs and time than its upfront price.

faq.q: How often should I update my estate plan?
faq.a: Review every 3-5 years or after major life events: marriage, divorce, birth of a child, significant asset changes, or moving to a new state.
